_meta.title: Data Protection to PDPA (Malaysia) Technical Requirements Cross-Reference
_meta.note: Links technical data protection controls to PDPA technical implementation requirements. Full PDPA coverage is in the pdpa-my repo.

mappings.technicalLink: Classification supports identifying personal data requiring PDPA protection
Encryption at rest protects personal data as required by security principle
Encryption in transit for cross-border personal data transfers
DLP prevents unauthorized disclosure of personal data
Data masking and de-identification support data minimization
Secure disposal supports compliance with retention limits
